content.en:
Soon, the news of the destruction of the Devouring Clan spread, and many Dao Ancestors breathed a sigh of relief.

For a long time, the Devouring Clan was the existence they feared the most, and they didn't even dare to leave the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, for fear that if they encountered the Devouring Clan after going out, it would be over.

Now that the Devouring Clan is extinct, they don't have to worry, many Dao Ancestors have left the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, wandering around the Daoshan Realm, and the major forces have also regained control over all parts of the Daoshan Realm.

Ye Tian, on the other hand, returned to the human realm and continued to retreat and cultivate.

At present, Ye Tian has not yet reached the extreme of the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, he wants to cultivate for a period of time, impact the extreme of the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, and then impact the level of the half-step domain ancestor of the One Realm, and reach the level of the oneness of all things, and his strength will skyrocket.

With his current strength, there was no need to continue to stay at the level of the Ten Thousand Things Realm.

So, Ye Tian retreated and cultivated.

This time, he entered the Battlefield Realm of the Warring Tower.

Compared to the human world, the cultivation environment inside the Battle Realm Tower is much better, especially the many treasure places that assist in the comprehension of the forbidden path, and even surpass the Eternal Source Stone Statue in some aspects.

The Eternal Source Stone Statue is very precious, and even if it is placed in the Divine Heaven Realm, it is also a supreme treasure.

But for the Battle Gate, the Eternal Source Stone Statue is really not too precious.

Before, Ye Tian didn't know which kind of creature the Eternal Source Stone statue imitated, but now he knew.

The Eternal Source Stone Statue is a powerful man who has smashed a trace of the will of the forbidden creatures at the invincible domain ancestor level into the Eternal Source Stone Statue, which has created such a treasure that can assist in the comprehension of the Forbidden Dao and the Forbidden Dao Technique.

But such a treasure is a relatively common treasure in the Dark Sanctuary to assist in the comprehension of the forbidden path.

Of course.

Ye Tian did not give up the opportunity to comprehend the Eternal Source Stone Statue, his replica body stayed in the Wind Mountain to comprehend the Eternal Source Stone Statue, while the main body entered the Battle Realm Tower and went to some treasures of the Battle Gate to comprehend and cultivate.

In this case, the speed of enlightenment at the same time will be very fast.

It is estimated that it will not be long before Ye Tian can ascend to the extreme of the Ten Thousand Realm, and even break through to the Half-step Domain Ancestor level of the Unified Realm soon.

In the Dark Sanctuary, many of the Ten Thousand Things Realm are not in a hurry to break through, they want to accumulate deeper, or even to cultivate a certain secret technique, or pass a certain assessment.

But Ye Tian is not necessary, he can kill a domain ancestor like the Frost Heaven Holy Ancestor now, what else does he need to accumulate?

As Ye Tian retreated and cultivated, time passed little by little.

At the same time, Ye Tian did not stop taking the Holy Body Fruit to refine the Holy Body, nor did he give up the Holy Technique.

In short, Ye Tian made full use of his time and did not waste a little time.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's cultivation was finally elevated to the extreme of the realm of all things, the forbidden dao was raised to the extreme of the realm of all things, and the path of the flesh body was also raised to the extreme of the realm of all things.

It can be said that as long as he impacts again and reaches the level of the unity of all things, he can enter the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor Realm.

And this step is not difficult for him at all.

"Break through!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Rumble!!!

Under the mutual influence of the extreme forbidden dao and the physical body dao of the realm of all things, Ye Tian's cultivation broke through, and his body began to usher in a qualitative change.

This breakthrough, Ye Tian completed it in the War Domain Realm.

Moreover, there is a special place for breakthroughs in the battle realm, which fully meets the needs of his breakthrough energy, and does not need other treasures to assist in breaking through.

A large amount of energy poured into Ye Tian's body, promoting his breakthrough needs.

After a long time, Ye Tian's breakthrough was completed, and he completely stepped into the level of the Returning Realm.

And his strength has reached a terrifying level.

"Very strong !!"

Ye Tian stood up, moved his body, and felt the endless terrifying power in his body.

At this moment, he is far ahead of his previous self.

"My current conventional combat power should have reached the eightfold one-fold realm combat power, and if I use the power of the Eternal Immortal Holy Body and the Extreme Dao, I should be able to step into the top nine-fold one-fold realm half-step domain ancestor combat power. If you use Xiao Cheng's peak-level holy technique again, your combat power may be able to break the limit of the combat power of the Nine Folds and Half Step Domain Ancestor and step into another level, I don't know if it can be compared to the elite domain ancestor in the Dark Forbidden Domain?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Moreover, he had just broken through to the One Realm, and there was still a lot of improvement, and there was a lot of room for improvement in the Holy Technique and the Holy Body.

"At the half-step Domain Ancestor level of the Returning Realm, the Forbidden Dao and the Flesh Dao are all one, and there is no room for further progress, but the Forbidden Dao and the Flesh Dao can be fused, and the half-step Domain Ancestor level of the Returning Realm progresses towards the Domain Ancestor, which is the process of continuously merging the Forbidden Dao and the Flesh Dao. Only the perfect integration can be regarded as the true level of consummation of the unified realm. After that, if you comprehend the true meaning of the Domain Ancestor, the forbidden body will reach ten percent perfection, and you will be able to impact the Domain Ancestor realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And the level of the Returning Realm takes a long time, even in the Dark Sacred Realm, those so-called Holy Sons, who have sufficient resources, need to stay in the Returning Realm for a long time.

Therefore, if Ye Tian wanted to impact the Domain Ancestor level in a short period of time, it was almost unrealistic.

At the same time as Ye Tian's progress, Jinchen Dao Ancestor, Dragon Shadow Dao Ancestor, and Thunder Tribulation Dao Ancestor also made great progress, and they traded all the resources from Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, in exchange for a lot of points in the Battle Realm Tower, in exchange for a good inheritance, and exchanged for resources that were useful to themselves, so their strength improved not slowly, and they were much stronger than in the past.

According to the strength division of the Dark Sacred Domain, the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord currently roughly has the combat power of the Half-Step Domain Ancestor of the Five-Fold Returning Realm, and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord and the Jinchen Dao Ancestor roughly have the combat power of the Four-Fold Returning to the One Realm and the Half-Step Domain Ancestor.

As for the Wind Mountain Lord, his strength has not changed, because he is a clone and cannot improve his strength.

this day.

The Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain invited Ye Tian to enter Wind Mountain to discuss a matter, and Ye Tian came!

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, I'm afraid that the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm is about to be promoted!"

The main road of Fengshan Mountain.

"Promotion? Are you saying that the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm is going to be promoted to the Forbidden Realm?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

"That's good!" "The Wind Mountain Lord nodded, "Originally, it was impossible to be so fast, but the last time the Devouring Clan was killed, they sacrificed the Devouring Clan, thus making the origin of the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm grow a lot, and the appearance of the Battle Realm Tower allowed the Half-Step Domain Ancestors to come into contact with the Half-Step Domain Ancestors in the depths of the Dark Sacred Domain, and they could also exchange for many extremely precious treasures, among which the treasures that promoted the world were very common in the Dark Sacred Domain." Even the Forbidden Realm was just a weak world for the Dark Sanctuary. The Heavenly Emperor Palace seems to be afraid of your strength, so it exchanged for a treasure and merged into the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, you are cultivating in retreat, so you didn't find it, but I did. Moreover, if you carefully probe the origin of the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, you will know that it is about to transform!"

Ye Tian's consciousness probed the origin of the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, and sure enough, he found that the origin of the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm was many times stronger than in the past, and he was in a period of imminent promotion.

"It seems that the Heavenly Emperor Palace is going to take over the Vast Sea Ancestor, and my body will also come when the time comes!Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, I don't know what the situation is in the Divine Heaven Realm now, but once the Forbidden Realm is born, I'm afraid there will be disputes here again. "

The Mountain Lord of the Wind Mountain sighed.

Ye Tian nodded, but he was not afraid of anything.

His strength has improved a lot now, even in the face of the elite domain ancestor of the Divine Heaven Realm, he dares to fight with him, who wins and who loses, it's not clear!
